action.reasoning: Observation: Starting new experiment. Analysis: We need to establish a baseline and understand the TripoSR API for rendering specific camera poses. I will write a `train.py` that inspects the TripoSR source code (specifically `model.render` and `model.renderer`) and saves a dummy checkpoint. I will also write a `predict.py` that uses the default `model.render` (which generates a turntable) to validate the evaluation pipeline and measure eval time. The turntable won't match the exact target poses, so the initial LPIPS will be poor, but it will ensure the pipeline works. Decision: Run `train.py` to inspect API and submit eval with `predict.py`.
